name: task-github
description: DefinitionArtifact-based task protocol with optional full GitHub recording and wiki integration.

interface.shortDescription: Define and run tasks locally or as full GitHub trees.
interface.longDescription: Defines immutable provider-neutral task revisions, runs them locally or projects their full tree to GitHub, and preserves legacy Issue-first workflows. Integrates with wiki-markdown task bridge nodes when a local wiki vault exists and follows auto-loaded agent operating policy from CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md.
defaultPrompt: Use $define to create an immutable task definition and choose local or GitHub recording.
Use $start to claim and load a legacy or projected issue.
Use $status to inspect current task state.
Use $orchestrate to run a GitHub issue tree in solo mode.
Use $done or $merge to close out work through gear-gated PR or FF merge paths.
